task_completion.description: Verify the agent has successfully logged into the NOSH ChartingSystem.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH EHR dashboard is visible in a web browser, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has opened the interface to compose a new intra-office message.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Message', 'Compose', or messaging window/tab is open within the NOSH interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the recipient is set to Dr. James Carter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'To' or recipient field in the message composition window shows 'Dr. James Carter' or 'demo_provider'.

task_completion.description: Verify the message is linked to patient Maria Rodriguez.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient search, regarding, or link field in the message composition window displays 'Maria Rodriguez'.

task_completion.description: Verify the subject and body contain the required critical lab information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The subject line contains 'URGENT' (or 'URGENT: Critical Lab Value') and the message body contains '6.2' (or 'Lab called. Potassium 6.2. Please advise.').
The agent is seen clicking the 'Send' button, a 'Message Sent' confirmation toast/alert is visible, or the message appears in the 'Sent' folder.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with NOSH.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is open and navigating the NOSH EHR interface, rather than using a script or terminal to send the message.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal does not show direct database insertions (e.g., mysql commands) or API requests (e.g., curl) related to sending the message.

integrity.description: Verify the interaction happened within the genuine NOSH ChartingSystem.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI matches the NOSH EHR system, not a generic text editor or a locally created fake HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Recipient must be 'Dr. James Carter' (username: demo_provider). Patient linked must be 'Maria Rodriguez'. Subject must contain the keyword 'URGENT'. Body must contain the keyword '6.2'.
